Package scorefour.common

package scorefour.common
Common classes which are used among more thant one class, such as interfaces and enumerators.
  • Class
    Description
    BeadColour
    A enumerator which describes a bead colour.
    ButtonAction
    The ButtonAction to be executed when a ButtonController is interacted with.
    Command
    A Command is a way the user can interact with the program using string in a command line.
    Controllable
    A Controllable class is a class which need to be updated every game loop.
    GameMode
    A GameMode allows a program to be run in various ways.
    GameState
    GameState allows the game to gracefully switch between various modes.
    Interactable
     
    Updatable
    A Dynamic class is a class which updates every game loop.
    VersusMode
    VersusMode dictates what kinds of Player's will take part in the game.
    Viewable
    Classes which render images to a Panel are considered Viewable.
